raw_consumer_statement: I disputed a transaction from a thief back in XXXX ( merchant : XXXX XXXX XXXX ) and Citi is just now resolving the dispute in favor of the merchant ( nearly 6 months later ) despite copious evidence of non performance and clear breach of contract. XXXX XXXX of XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX and Citi/mastercard are completely in the wrong here and there is seemingly no recourse at this point. I am closing my card and will never do business with Citi ever again!
